_cite.reason: URL-normalization 1c: strip trailing markdown-emphasis `*`/backtick glued to citation URLs in intelligence_item_sections.content_md (customer-checkable link + validate_item_provenance criterion-2 exact-compare). Operator ruling 2026-07-04. Same transform as the write-site fix.

prior.content_md:
AFIR imposes no registration or reporting obligations on freight forwarders or on the workspace in its supply chain role.

Member States are obligated to submit national policy framework reports to the European Commission under Article 14. These reports are public documents and constitute the primary monitoring source for infrastructure deployment progress.

The workspace has no registration, reporting, or notification obligation under AFIR.

*Source: Regulation (EU) 2023/1804, Article 14, EUR-Lex, 22 September 2023. https://eur-lex.europa.eu/eli/reg/2023/1804/oj/eng*

---
